strategic_objective: Clarify whether near-constant bulk and flag features reflect true network saturation or measurement artifacts and assess their masking effect on subtle attack-relevant variations.
key_checks: Compare cardinality and value stability of bulk and flag features across classes
Assess correlation of near-constant features with known saturation indicators
Evaluate presence of subtle intra-class variation within these features
Check for measurement or logging constraints causing low diversity
success_criteria: Evidence distinguishes genuine saturation from measurement limitations
Identification of any masked subtle variations relevant to attack detection
Characterization of feature stability across temporal or traffic segments
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for bulk and flag features
preserve evidence references e23 to e32
